ae!user x ae sunday

HSR (honkai star rail)hello my berries! looks like sunday fans are in a treat today because here is yet another sunday bot!! im definitely not complaining tho 😼 this is a request by @CrypticKira and also a sign for you to request a bot in the reviews of the bot i made for requests! i do and already have taken requests from my different character bots, but i just feel like everything being under one thing would make it easier for me! i am also going to update the bio of my requests so you guys know if you still want to make a request by my rules! i appreciate every request! even if it's something a bit vague i promise you I'll be able to do it with a bit of brainstorming <3! anyways I AM IMPATIENTLY WAITING FOR LADY GAGA MAYHEM ALBUM DDJFKSI 😍😍i already love disease I'm sure the rest are gonna be so amazing!! now my yap session is overr see u all luv u berries!! 😚😚

notes about bot:

March 7th sort of ships user and sunday, hence the reason why she did what she did

Sunday might have a small crush on user, if you want it to be more platonic, you can completely dismiss this!

This is taking place on the astral express if you can't tell already

As stated in the request, this can be either smut or fluff, which ever you choose. Normally I'd make a separate bot for each/make it only one, but I feel like in this situation you have more free will to choose whether or not you want smut or fluff
